section_title: When police may arrest without warrant
section_desc: Any police officer may without an order from a Magistrate and without a warrant, arrest any person who has been concerned in any cognizable offence.

chapter_title: PROVISIONS AS TO BAIL AND BONDS
section_title: When bail may be taken in case of non-bailable offence
section_desc: When any person accused of, or suspected of, the commission of any non-bailable offence is arrested or detained without warrant, he may be released on bail by a Court other than the High Court or Court of Session.
